Candidate list was empty. Selected 'Goods and services' from the full preview because it is the clearest direct operating/service cost line immediately below revenue and best matches cost of sales/COGS, but this requires manual review since it was chosen outside candidates.

candidates.row_label: Salary and other employment benefit expenses
candidates.why: Potential overhead/personnel cost component, though for this company some labor may be direct operating cost.
Could contain overhead, but in this statement it appears broad and includes items like fuel and vessel/public port costs, so not clean SG&A.
Total operating expenses; should not be used when components/subtotals exist.
Explicit SG&A row exists, but preview is empty; semantically strongest SG&A label and may apply in some years.

variables.notes: Explicit SG&A row exists ('Selling, General & Admin') so it is selected despite empty preview values. Added 'Sales and marketing expenses' because it is a clear overhead component with populated values in earlier years. Broader rows such as 'Operating expenses' and 'Other operating expenses' were excluded because they appear to include COGS-like/direct operating items (e.g., fuel, vessel/public port costs) and would overstate SG&A. Manual review is needed because overhead appears mixed with direct operating costs in this statement.
